prompt: [PROMPT: COMPLEX DYNAMIC WHITENED ISOMETRIC ILLUSTRATION] A dynamic, complex isometric illustration with clean black outlines and soft-cell shading, in the 'Whitened Dynamic Conceptual' style. A matte black silhouette figure stands on a fragmented isometric White #FFFFFF platform on the left side, holding a large hexagonal shield shape in front of them (Blue #6C82FE faces with White #FFFFFF segments, clean #111111 outlines). A padlock icon is embedded in the shield center (Blue #6C82FE body, Orange #F59400 keyhole). In the center of the composition, a complex fragmented semi-circular dial gauge floats on an isometric White #FFFFFF platform. The dial has 4 clearly labeled arc sections arranged left to right: the leftmost arc is dark #111111 ('Closed'), next is Blue #6C82FE ('Minimal'), next is Blue #6C82FE with White #FFFFFF fragmented faces ('Selective'), rightmost is Orange #F59400 ('Open'). A bold Orange #F59400 needle pointer sits on the 'Selective' position. The dial structure is 3D isometric with intentionally fragmented geometry, specific faces are Pure White #FFFFFF to create whiteness and light. From the dial, three thin precise lines (Blue #6C82FE) extend to the right, connecting to three floating isometric UI cards at different visibility levels: top card (White #FFFFFF with #111111 outlines, a music note icon in Orange #F59400, fully visible, representing shared data), middle card (Blue #6C82FE with White face, a health cross icon in Pink #FC6978, semi-transparent and ghosted, representing restricted data), bottom card (White #FFFFFF with Blue #6C82FE border, a location pin icon in Orange #F59400, fully visible, representing shared data). Below the dial, 4 small matte black silhouette figures of different heights (a family: tall adult, medium adult, smaller child, smallest child) stand in a row, each with a tiny colored dot above their head (Blue #6C82FE, Orange #F59400, Pink #FC6978, Blue #6C82FE) suggesting per-person disclosure settings. A small Orange #F59400 curved arrow connects between two of the figures. Extensive light gray #EEEEEE background space creating airiness. All elements have precise #111111 outlines. Shading is soft-cell, no gradients. Element White #FFFFFF used strategically throughout to create cleanliness and light within the design.
